chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1760 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on CMA. No.8101/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 25-03-2025 M/s. Ghulam Haider Shaikh and Manzar H. Memon, advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent department. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent submits under instructions that the impugned demand notices subject matter herein are being withdrawn forthwith, subject to right of the department to initiate proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
